fn_declaraion.fn_code:
TIFFWriteNormalSubTag(TIFF *, TIFFDirEntry *, const TIFFFieldInfo *,
                                 int (*getFieldFn)(TIFF *tif, ttag_t tag, ...))

TIFFWriteShortArray(TIFF *, TIFFDataType, ttag_t, TIFFDirEntry *,
                               uint32_t, uint16_t *)

TIFFWriteLongArray(TIFF *, TIFFDataType, ttag_t, TIFFDirEntry *,
                              uint32_t, uint32_t *)

TIFFWriteRationalArray(TIFF *, TIFFDataType, ttag_t, TIFFDirEntry *,
                                  uint32_t, float *)

TIFFWriteFloatArray(TIFF *, TIFFDataType, ttag_t, TIFFDirEntry *,
                               uint32_t, float *)

TIFFWriteDoubleArray(TIFF *, TIFFDataType, ttag_t, TIFFDirEntry *,
                                uint32_t, double *)

TIFFWriteAnyArray(TIFF *, TIFFDataType, ttag_t, TIFFDirEntry *,
                             uint32_t, double *)
